data.title: Sotetsu Holdings Hikes Year-End Dividend, Lifts Annual Payout to 70 Yen
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Sotetsu Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:9003) ) is now available.

Sotetsu Holdings, Inc. has approved a year-end dividend of 40 yen per share for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, raising the payout by 5 yen compared with its most recent forecast and the previous fiscal year. The total dividend for the year will rise to 70 yen per share, reflecting solid performance and the group’s policy of adjusting shareholder returns in line with earnings, investment plans and the operating environment.

The increase lifts the total dividend amount to 3,838 million yen, up from 3,404 million yen a year earlier, subject to approval at the June 26, 2026 shareholders’ meeting. This higher distribution underscores Sotetsu’s confidence in its financial position and signals a modestly more shareholder-friendly stance, while still emphasizing prudent reinvestment to support its core railway and related businesses over the long term.

More about Sotetsu Holdings, Inc.

Sotetsu Holdings, Inc. is a Japanese transportation group centered on railway operations, operating in a sector with a high degree of public interest. The company focuses on long-term, sound management while balancing profit distribution to shareholders with capital investment needs and the reinforcement of internal reserves.

Average Trading Volume: 296,115

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen269.6B

Learn more about 9003 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Enterprise Metals Replaces Appendix 3G With New Options Filing
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Enterprise Metals Limited ( (AU:ENT) ) just unveiled an update.

Enterprise Metals Limited has withdrawn a previously lodged Appendix 3G relating to the issue, conversion or payment up of unquoted securities. The company states that the original notice has been cancelled and will be replaced by an Appendix 2A covering the issue and quotation of unlisted options.

The move is essentially an administrative correction in the way the new options are documented and brought to market. While it does not alter the underlying securities transaction, it ensures the capital markets disclosure is aligned with ASX requirements and provides greater clarity for investors tracking the company’s capital structure.

More about Enterprise Metals Limited

Enterprise Metals Limited is an Australian-listed company trading under the ASX code ENT. The firm operates in the resources sector, with activities typically centred on exploration and development of mineral assets for the metals and mining market.

Current Market Cap: A$6.42M

data.title: Oriental Land Marks Listing Anniversary With Special Disney Resort Shareholder Perk
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Oriental Land Co ( (JP:4661) ) has provided an update.

Oriental Land Co. will introduce a special shareholder benefit program in the fiscal year ending March 2027 to commemorate the 30th anniversary of its stock exchange listing. The move follows last year’s one-off benefit for the company’s 65th foundation anniversary and underscores management’s emphasis on rewarding investors who support the long‑term growth of Tokyo Disney Resort.

Shareholders holding at least 100 shares as of September 30, 2026, will receive one additional one‑day complimentary passport that can be used at either Tokyo Disneyland or Tokyo DisneySea, on top of existing regular and long‑term benefits. The special tickets, valid until August 31, 2027 and subject to certain blackout periods, are expected to enhance the appeal of holding Oriental Land stock and further align shareholder incentives with guest traffic at its flagship parks.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4661) stock is a Hold with a Yen3300.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oriental Land Co stock, see the JP:4661 Stock Forecast page.

More about Oriental Land Co

Oriental Land Co., Ltd. operates in the leisure and entertainment industry as the owner and operator of Tokyo Disney Resort near Tokyo. Its core business centers on theme park operations at Tokyo Disneyland and Tokyo DisneySea, complemented by related resort services aimed at attracting domestic and international guests in Japan’s tourism and recreation market.

data.title: Burley Minerals Warns Holders of Imminent BURO Option Expiry
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Burley Minerals Ltd. ( (AU:BUR) ) is now available.

Burley Minerals has notified holders of its listed BURO options that these securities, exercisable at $0.05, will expire at 5.00pm WST on 31 May 2026, with ASX quotation to cease at the close of trading on 25 May 2026. Option holders may choose to exercise some or all of their options, sell them before trading ceases, or allow them to lapse, with each exercised option converting into one fully paid ordinary share.

The company highlighted that there is no obligation to exercise and provided pricing context, noting its shares last traded at $0.03, below the $0.05 exercise price, with a three-month trading range between $0.019 and $0.037. The approaching expiry crystallises a decision point for option holders, potentially affecting Burley’s capital structure, liquidity, and the level of shareholder participation depending on how many options are ultimately converted into shares.

More about Burley Minerals Ltd.

Burley Minerals Ltd is an Australian-listed resources company focused on mineral exploration and development, with its ordinary shares traded on the ASX under the code BUR and its listed options under BURO. The company operates within the mining and exploration sector, giving investors leveraged exposure to underlying commodity and project performance through its equity and option securities.

Average Trading Volume: 218,539

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

RVRC Holding AB ( (SE:RVRC) ) has provided an announcement.

RevolutionRace has announced its financial reporting schedule for the 2026/27 financial year, which runs from July 1 to June 30, detailing dates for interim reports, year-end reports, its annual and sustainability report, and the annual general meeting. The calendar gives investors and analysts clear visibility on upcoming disclosures and corporate governance events, underscoring the company’s intent to maintain transparency and regular communication with the market.

Reports will be released at 07:30 CET/CEST, followed by webcasted press and analyst conferences on publication days, enabling timely access to management commentary and financial data. The structured timetable supports stakeholder planning around key information releases, which can influence trading activity, valuation assessments, and engagement with the company during the coming financial year.

More about RVRC Holding AB

RVRC Holding AB, which operates under the brand RevolutionRace, is a fast-growing outdoor apparel and gear company focused on multifunctional clothing, shoes, backpacks, and accessories for active lifestyles. The Sweden-based group sells primarily through a digital direct-to-consumer model, reaching customers in around 40 countries, and has been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.

data.title: SoftBank Revamps Board Lineup to Strengthen Governance Ahead of 2026 AGM
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SoftBank Group ( (JP:9984) ) has shared an announcement.

SoftBank Group Corp. has proposed changes to its board of directors ahead of its 46th Annual General Meeting scheduled for June 24, 2026, seeking shareholder approval to reelect seven current directors and appoint two new outside directors. The nominations of Komatsu senior adviser Tetsuji Ohashi and Mizuho Securities outside director Miwa Ohmori, alongside the planned departure of Masami Iijima and Keiko Erikawa, signal a continued emphasis on external, independent oversight, with the post-AGM board and audit structure featuring a strong lineup of independent officers that may enhance governance and investor confidence.

After the reshuffle, founder Masayoshi Son will remain representative director, supported by key executives Yoshimitsu Goto and Ken Miyauchi and external directors including Rene Haas, Yutaka Matsuo, Kenneth A. Siegel, David Chao, Ohashi, and Ohmori. The Audit & Supervisory Board will also remain heavily composed of external and independent members, suggesting SoftBank is maintaining a governance framework aligned with Japanese corporate governance best practices and global investor expectations.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9984) stock is a Hold with a Yen4000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SoftBank Group stock, see the JP:9984 Stock Forecast page.

More about SoftBank Group

SoftBank Group Corp. is a Japan-based multinational investment holding company focused on technology, telecommunications, and internet sectors. Through its portfolio and funds, it invests in high-growth tech businesses globally, aiming to capitalize on advances in AI, connectivity, and digital platforms.

Average Trading Volume: 55,884,382

data.title: Toho Holdings to Fully Redeem Zero Coupon Convertible Bonds Two Years Early
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Toho Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:8129) ) has issued an announcement.

Toho Holdings Co., Ltd. will fully redeem its outstanding Zero Coupon Convertible Bonds due 2028 after meeting the conditions for a clean-up call. The bonds, originally issued in June 2023 with a total principal of 22 billion yen, now have 1.75 billion yen outstanding, all of which will be redeemed at par on May 28, 2026, with the last date to exercise stock acquisition rights set for May 25, 2026.

This early redemption shortens the company’s financing horizon by two years and effectively closes out potential future equity dilution from these convertible bonds. The move may signal confidence in Toho Holdings’ balance sheet and cash position, while also clarifying its capital structure for existing shareholders and debt investors ahead of the original 2028 maturity.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8129) stock is a Hold with a Yen5000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Toho Holdings Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:8129 Stock Forecast page.

More about Toho Holdings Co., Ltd.

Toho Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based company listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating under securities code 8129. The group is engaged in the healthcare sector, with a focus on pharmaceutical distribution and related services that support medical institutions and pharmacies across the country.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric Lifts Profit and Dividend on Infrastructure and Automation Gains
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mitsubishi Electric ( (JP:6503) ) has provided an announcement.

Mitsubishi Electric reported solid fiscal 2026 results, with revenue rising 7% to 5.89 trillion yen and net profit attributable to shareholders jumping 26% to 407.7 billion yen, driven by a weaker yen, price improvements, and stronger performance in infrastructure, building systems, air conditioning, and factory automation. Profitability metrics improved, including operating profit up 11% and ROE up to 9.7%, while the company expanded total assets and equity and raised its annual dividend to 55 yen per share, reflecting a commitment to higher shareholder returns alongside continued investment in growth and a stronger balance sheet.

The group’s infrastructure and life segments benefited from transportation, power transmission and distribution, defense projects, and overseas building systems growth, while digital innovation businesses also expanded, partly offsetting weakness in automotive equipment and flat semiconductor demand. Management highlighted ongoing business transformation and portfolio optimization under its business area management structure, indicating a continued strategic shift toward higher-margin, AI- and data center-related capital expenditure markets, which could reinforce Mitsubishi Electric’s competitive position in factory automation, energy systems, and digital solutions despite macroeconomic softness in China and rising global tariffs.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:6503) stock is a Buy with a Yen6500.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mitsubishi Electric stock, see the JP:6503 Stock Forecast page.

More about Mitsubishi Electric

Mitsubishi Electric Corporation is a diversified Japanese industrial and electronics group operating across infrastructure, life (building systems and air conditioning), industry and mobility, digital innovation, and semiconductor devices. The company supplies products and systems ranging from power transmission, transportation, defense and space solutions to factory automation, automotive equipment, IT infrastructure, and building-related equipment, with a strong global footprint in Japan, Europe, North America, and emerging markets.

Average Trading Volume: 6,723,188

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
